companies.body:
# 2iC Limited

> UK software company providing digital interoperability across disparate devices, platforms and systems in the battlespace.

## What they do

2iC develops off-the-shelf software that connects users to a growing inventory of disparate devices, platforms and systems, creating a responsive and resilient network with real-time access to sensors, effectors and intelligence products. The company is the inventor of the Lean Services Architecture, a modular and open architecture standard for the battlespace tested and published by the UK Ministry of Defence. It states its software is designed for tactical and DDIL (denied, degraded, intermittent and limited bandwidth) environments.

## Products and solutions

- **2iC NODE** - enterprise licence software suite providing the digital backbone, service discovery and automation across systems and devices.
- **2iC CONNECT** - software connecting disparate devices and systems, including out-of-the-box solutions 2iC CONNECT:UNCREWED (for autonomous and uncrewed systems) and 2iC CONNECT:TAK (for TAK ecosystems).
- **2iC TRUST** - secure and flexible interoperability across different trust domains (classification, nationality or organisation).
- **2iC TOOLKIT** - software for engineers to research, develop and test modular, open and interoperable systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** JOSCAR.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-10-10** - Spectra Group and 2iC announced a MANET-to-satellite (GENSS) tactical data bridging solution using 2iC software. [source](https://www.2icworld.com/spectra-group-and-2ic-deliver-breakthrough-manet-to-satellite-connectivity/)
- **2025** - 2iC named as part of SCEPTRE, a sovereign UK technology stack of British SMEs, providing the digital backbone. [source](https://sceptre.org.uk/news/uk-smes-unite-to-launch-sceptre-a-next-gen-sovereign-stack/)

## Links

- Website: https://2icworld.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/2icworld

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, Companies House, ADS members directory, SCEPTRE and Spectra Group public announcements.

# AdaCore

> Supplier of development and verification tools for safety- and security-critical software.

## What they do

AdaCore develops tools and provides support for the production of safety-critical and security-critical software. Its technologies are used by aerospace, defence and rail contractors for high-integrity systems including tactical command and control, missile and artillery launcher systems, and missile defence. The group is headquartered in New York, with the UK entity AdaCore Ltd (registered office in Yeovil) operating as a centre of excellence for safety- and security-critical software tools, opened in 2019.

# ADDEV Materials UK Limited

> Aerospace and defence materials specialist: chemicals, coatings, adhesives, films, tapes and custom packaging, with a UK operation in Hampshire.

## What they do

ADDEV Materials is a supplier of high-performance materials for the aerospace and defence industries, covering engineered chemical solutions, advanced converting and custom packaging. The group designs custom value-added materials for aircraft manufacturers, equipment suppliers, airlines, MRO providers, operators and defence integrators. Its UK presence was established in 2019 through the acquisition of the Graytone Group, including Pexa and PSG, and the UK entity (formerly Graytone Limited) operates from Bordon, Hampshire. Headquarters of the wider group are in Lyon, France.

## Products and solutions

- **Adhesives, sealants and surface treatments** - aerospace-specification adhesives, sealants, cleaners, solvents and surface preparation fluids.
- **Paints and coatings** - primers, topcoats, conformal coatings, corrosion inhibiting compounds (CICs) and specialty coatings; distribution of brands including AkzoNobel, PPG, Henkel and Sherwin-Williams.
- **Tapes, foams, films and composites** - technical films, tapes, foams, laminates, composite fabrics, prepregs and resins.
- **Converting and engineered components** - die-cut adhesives, foams, films, insulation, gaskets and bonding components.
- **Custom packaging (Andpak)** - repackaging of aerospace chemicals into aerosols, cartridges, syringes, tubes, pouches and bespoke formats.
- **Zip-Chem** - OEM-approved corrosion inhibitors, cleaners and lubricants for airlines, MROs and military operators.

The group serves commercial aviation, business aviation, MRO, space, air defence and land defence markets.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, EN/AS 9100, AS 9120, IATA dangerous goods compliance.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Composites UK; North West Aerospace Alliance.

# Advai

> UK deep-tech specialist in AI assurance, testing AI and machine-learning systems for robustness, safety and security.

## What they do

Advai is a UK deep-tech company focused on AI safety and security. It tests and evaluates artificial intelligence and machine-learning systems, including large language models and computer vision, so customers can assure them for deployment in business-critical or regulated environments. Its tooling stress-tests AI to find reliable operating boundaries and build early warning systems for natural or adversarial failure. From defence origins, the company now also serves regulated commercial sectors.

## Products and solutions

- **Advai platform** - testing, compliance assurance and continuous monitoring across the AI lifecycle, covering performance, security, safety, robustness, auditability and stability, producing go-live thresholds and evidence packs for deployment sign-off.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** funded through the Defence and Security Accelerator (DASA) from 2020 across multiple projects.

companies.body:
# Advanced Blast & Ballistic Systems Limited

> UK developer of active and passive blast-mitigation systems for armoured vehicle occupant survivability, with related emergency descent systems for eVTOL and light aircraft.

## What they do

ABBS develops survivability technology to protect the occupants of armoured vehicles from mine and IED under-belly blast. Its approach combines active systems that counteract the blast with passive shock-absorbing components, and the same rocket-motor expertise is applied to emergency descent systems for eVTOL aircraft through a joint venture. The company sits at the head of a group that includes Advanced Reaction Motor Systems (ARMS) and Active VTOL Crash Prevention (AVCP).

## Products and solutions

- **VGAM (Vehicle Global Acceleration Mitigation)** - patented Linear Rocket Motors (LRM) that counteract mine-blast lifting forces to prevent a vehicle being thrown into the air.
- **VAFS (Vehicle Active Floor System)** - actuators that pull the floor away from occupants' feet to reduce floor-shock injury.
- **CRBP (Composite Reinforced Belly Plate)** - a passive belly plate with composite beams and an energy-absorbing layer to reduce deformation and shock transfer.
- **Minefield breaching vehicle concept** - a vehicle design with built-in mine resilience and protection against RPG and anti-tank missile strikes.
- **Mine-resilient and mine-clearance uncrewed ground vehicles (UGVs)** - concepts applying ABBS technologies to lightweight autonomous platforms.
- **AVCP zero-zero safety system** - ballistic recovery and emergency descent systems for eVTOL and light aircraft (via the AVCP joint venture).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-10-03** - Article published, "Can Europe Create a 'Drone Wall'". [source](https://www.advanced-blast.com/can-europe-create-a-drone-wall/)
- **2025-09-24** - Article published on developing solutions for threats from unmanned aerial systems (UAS). [source](https://www.advanced-blast.com/developing-solutions-for-threats-from-umanned-aerial-systems-uas/)

# Advanced Logistics for Aerospace (UK) Limited

> UK arm of ALA Group, an Italy-headquartered supply chain integrator and distributor to the aerospace and defence sector.

## What they do

Advanced Logistics for Aerospace (UK) Limited is the UK entity of ALA Group (A.L.A. S.p.A.), an aerospace and defence supply chain integrator headquartered in Naples, Italy, with offices and operations across Italy, France, Germany, the United Kingdom, Israel and North America. The group describes itself as a single-source partner for the management and distribution of products, services and engineering solutions to aerospace and defence manufacturers, covering both production and aftermarket phases of programmes. The UK company is registered in Esher, Surrey, and was incorporated in 1988 under the former name Specialist Technologies Ltd.

## Products and solutions

- **Aerospace and defence supply chain integration** - distribution and management of hardware, components and engineered products for aerospace and defence OEMs and operators.
- **Production and aftermarket logistics** - supply chain services spanning production support, spare parts distribution, inventory management and in-service support.
- **Defence-sector product supply** - per the ADS member listing, product manufacturing and supply across defence-relevant categories including bomb disposal and explosive search equipment, CBRN and decontamination, asset tracking, replenishment-at-sea, search and rescue, and weapons storage.

It designs and manufactures springs (tension, compression and torsion), wire forms, precision pressings and stampings, deep drawn parts, coil thread inserts and metal inserts for composite materials. The company supplies aerospace OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers across civil and defence programmes, using processes including CNC coiling, deep drawing, micro-forming and multi-slide technology. # AERALIS

> UK developer of a modular family of jet aircraft built around reconfigurable common airframes.

## What they do

AERALIS designs a family of modular jet aircraft built around a common core fuselage with interchangeable wing and engine modules, intended to be reconfigured to cover roles from basic and advanced jet training through to aerobatics, display and light combat. The company opened its first site in Bristol and has assembled an industry supply base around the programme.

## Products and solutions

- **AERALIS Advanced Jet Trainer (AJT)** - the initial variant of the modular family, an advanced jet trainer reconfigurable across multiple training and light-combat roles through common modules.

# Agentycs

Agentycs is a UK company building agentic AI that operates across high-side and low-side networks, deployed from a UK sovereign cloud or at the tactical edge. The platform fuses structured, unstructured and sensor data in an AI-native lakehouse and supports hybrid search, natural-language analytics and agentic reasoning. ## What they do

Agilent Technologies LDA UK is the UK entity behind the former Cobalt Light Systems, a Harwell spin-out acquired by Agilent Technologies in 2017. It develops and manufactures Raman spectroscopy instruments that identify chemicals and materials through opaque barriers and sealed containers. > Operator of the Royal Air Force's Voyager air-to-air refuelling and transport fleet.

## What they do

AirTanker Services operates the RAF's fleet of Airbus A330 Multi-Role Tanker Transport aircraft, in RAF service known as Voyager. Voyager is a dedicated air-to-air refuelling platform that also operates in air transport and aeromedical evacuation roles. In 2008 the AirTanker consortium signed a 27-year contract with the Ministry of Defence to deliver and support 14 MRTT aircraft under the Future Strategic Tanker Aircraft (FSTA) programme. Alloyed Ltd, formerly OxMet Technologies, is a University of Oxford spin-out that develops proprietary metal alloys and end-to-end metal additive manufacturing for aerospace and other demanding sectors. # ANSYS UK

> UK subsidiary of Ansys, the engineering simulation software company whose tools are used across aerospace and defence.

## What they do

Ansys develops engineering simulation software that predicts how product designs behave in real-world environments, spanning structures, fluids, electromagnetics and multiphysics. ANSYS UK Limited is the Sheffield-registered UK entity of Ansys Inc, headquartered in Canonsburg, Pennsylvania. Ansys was acquired by Synopsys in July 2025 and is now a wholly owned subsidiary of that US company. Its simulation tools are used across aerospace and defence, supported by a dedicated public defence industry programme.

## Products and solutions

- **Ansys Mechanical** - structural finite element analysis.
- **Ansys Fluent** - computational fluid dynamics for fluid flow, heat transfer and reactions.
- **Ansys HFSS** - 3D electromagnetic simulation used for antenna design in aerospace and defence.
- **Ansys LS-DYNA** - explicit multiphysics for crash and impact, used in aerospace and military structural analysis.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# APC Technology Group

> Specialist distributor and systems integrator of electronic components and sub-systems for the defence, avionics and aerospace sectors.

## What they do

APC Technology Group is a UK and Ireland distributor and specialist for over 100 global electronic-technology manufacturers, providing design-in, specification and sourcing of specialist electronic components, control technologies and connectivity products. Its main focus, accounting for the majority of its sales, is the defence, avionics and aerospace sectors, where mission-critical reliability is required. It supports defence manufacturers and military primes with high-reliability and MIL-STD technology for naval, land and avionic applications. It is part of Certify Holdings.

# Aquark Technologies

> Southampton quantum-technology company building miniaturised, deployable cold-atom hardware.

## What they do

Aquark Technologies, a spin-out associated with the University of Southampton, develops miniaturised cold-atom quantum hardware for sensing and timing. Its technology laser-cools atoms to near absolute zero, packaged small enough to be portable and deployable. The company targets accuracy, precision and stability for critical operations across defence and industry.

## Products and solutions

- **AQlock** - described by the company as the first commercially available cold-atom atomic clock designed and built in the UK.
- **Cold-atom quantum sensing hardware** - deployable cold-atom systems for navigation, timing and sensing applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** awarded an Innovate UK contract to develop a high-performance cold atom clock.

## Recent news

# Hybrid Drones

> UK manufacturer of heavy-lift hybrid jet-electric uncrewed aerial systems, trading as HYDRA.

Hybrid Drones Ltd is a UK heavy-lift hybrid UAS manufacturer, founded in 2019 to develop a hybrid jet-electric VTOL drone concept. Its platforms are designed to carry large payloads over tactical distances, with a modular design offering fully-electric and multi-jet variants. Stated use cases include logistical resupply, ship-to-ship transfer, casualty evacuation and weapons employment.

> UK provider of unexploded ordnance survey, risk assessment and clearance services, formerly BACTEC.

## What they do

Igne UXO Ltd is the unexploded ordnance arm of Igne, a UK subsurface services group formed in 2023 by consolidating several specialist businesses. The UXO business, formerly BACTEC, specialises in unexploded ordnance risk mitigation and explosive ordnance disposal, with land and marine coverage and a nationwide geospatial UXO risk database. # Inova Design Solutions Ltd (trading as Bodytrak)

> In-ear wearable that provides real-time physiological monitoring, including core body temperature and heart rate, for workplace and operational safety.

## What they do

Bodytrak is a wearable safety solution built around an in-ear earpiece with multiple sensors that capture real-time physiological data, analysed by AI on the device and in the cloud. The ear's proximity to the hypothalamus allows the device to measure core body temperature and heart rate, with reported mean absolute error of 0.18C against the gastro-intestinal pill at elevated temperatures. The company markets the solution across industrial, emergency services, defence and scientific or research sectors.

## Products and solutions

- **Bodytrak 1** - in-ear wearable for real-time physiological monitoring.
- **Bodytrak 1 IS** - intrinsically safe variant for hazardous environments.
- **Smart Safety Solution** - platform covering heat stress monitoring, fatigue monitoring, lone worker safety, musculoskeletal disorder prevention, geolocation and geofencing, alerts and automated reporting.

Its floodlights, worklights, searchlights, flashlights, head torches and inspection lamps are used by the armed forces, police, fire and rescue, construction, oil and gas, and rail sectors worldwide. # QinetiQ

> A British defence technology company providing test and evaluation, training, and technical services across air, land, sea and cyber.

## What they do

QinetiQ Group plc is a British defence technology company headquartered at Cody Technology Park, Farnborough. It operates primarily in the defence, security and critical national infrastructure markets, running test and evaluation capabilities for air, land, sea and target systems and providing technical support, training and know-how to customers in the UK and North America. # Raptor Photonics

> Northern Ireland manufacturer of high-performance, low-light digital cameras and sensor cores for surveillance, aerospace, space and scientific markets.

## What they do

Raptor Photonics designs, manufactures and sells high-performance, low-light-level digital cameras and camera core engines for surveillance, aerospace and space, scientific and industrial OEM markets. It supplies both off-the-shelf and custom solutions using CCD, EMCCD, CMOS and InGaAs sensors across UV, visible and SWIR wavebands, with cameras built to military specifications and optimised for size, weight and power in harsh environments. Its ISTAR camera systems are deployed on electro-optic platforms from the sea-bed to space, including gimbals and turrets on air, sea and land platforms and payloads on low Earth orbit missions.

## Products and solutions

- **Eagle** - deep-cooled scientific CCD cameras.
- **Hawk** - compact, rugged CMOS cameras for electro-optic integration.
- **Owl** - SWIR and Vis-SWIR InGaAs cameras for night vision and surveillance.
- **Ninox** - cooled SWIR and Vis-SWIR InGaAs cameras.
- **Kestrel 640 eSWIR** - extended-SWIR camera with IRNova T2SL sensor, Stirling-cooled to 170K.
- **Eagle XV / Eagle XO** - X-ray cameras.
- **OEM solutions** - block cores for gimbals and EO turrets, flight-ready camera cores for space, hyperspectral and spectroscopy cores.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015; IPC-A-610 Class 3; Cyber Essentials and Cyber Essentials PLUS. Cameras designed to MIL-STD-810F and MIL-STD-704F.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Northern Ireland Photonics (NI-PIC).

## Recent news

- **2026-04-16** - Introduced the Kestrel 640 eSWIR extended-SWIR camera (originally announced as the Owl eSWIR 640). [source](https://www.raptorphotonics.com/raptor-continues-to-innovate-with-the-owl-eswir-640/)
- **2026-04** - Launched a new 5.2MP stabilised Vis-SWIR camera (Owl 2560 family). [source](https://www.edrmagazine.eu/raptor-photonics-launches-new-5-2mp-stabilised-vis-swir-camera)

companies.body:
# Sagentia Defence

> Defence science and technology consultancy, formerly TP Group, part of Science Group plc.

## What they do

Sagentia Defence, formerly TP Group, provides science and technology consultancy on mission-critical defence programmes. It positions itself as an independent, agnostic adviser and a trusted customer friend to the MOD, with defence experience spanning over 60 years. It works with national government bodies, international institutions and global prime contractors on systems engineering, feasibility analysis, enterprise transformation and programme delivery across the science and technology, maritime, air, land, joint, space and defence digital domains, across the full CADMID lifecycle. It is part of Science Group plc, an LSE-listed science and technology group headquartered near Cambridge that consolidated several consultancies under the Sagentia brand in 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Operational analysis** - technology analysis, roadmapping, modelling and simulation, requirements and decision analysis.
- **Cost engineering** - independent cost modelling, estimating and risk analysis.
- **Project, programme and portfolio management (P3M)** - managing complex defence programmes from inception to delivery.
- **Safety assurance and certification** - through-life safety across civil and military domains.
- **Supportability engineering** - integrated logistics support and supply chain management against MOD standards.
- **Systems engineering** - full lifecycle, applying ISO 15288.
- **Analysis and innovation** - pre-concept analysis, rapid concept generation and prototyping.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001; ISO/IEC 27001:2022; Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials PLUS; JOSCAR registered.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; INCOSE UK; APM; IET; IMechE; Operational Research Society; SCAF.

## Recent news

- **2025-03-17** - Launched the Sagentia Defence brand, replacing TP Group and integrating more than 300 consultants. [source](https://sagentia.com/news/sagentia-defence-a-new-era-for-the-former-tp-group/)
- **2026** - Published an insight on defence readiness as the defining priority for 2026, tied to the 2025 Strategic Defence Review. [source](https://sagentia.com/insight/defence-in-2026-readiness-is-the-defining-priority/)

## Links

- Website: https://sagentia.com/defence/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sagentiadefence

## Sources

Sources: Sagentia Defence website (sagentia.com/defence), ADS Group member profile (adsgroup.org.uk/members/sagentia-defence-1), Science Group plc (sciencegroup.com), Companies House. The large size band reflects the Science Group total of around 540 employees; standalone defence headcount is not public. The defence practice is Bristol-centred; the group is headquartered at Harston, near Cambridge.

companies.body:
# Sintela

> Bristol manufacturer of distributed fibre-optic sensing systems for security, perimeter and infrastructure monitoring.

## What they do

Sintela designs, manufactures and field-supports distributed fibre-optic sensing (DFOS) systems, with particular expertise in distributed acoustic sensing (DAS). Its ONYX systems turn existing fibre-optic cable into a long-range sensing platform that detects strain, temperature and acoustic changes for security, perimeter intrusion detection and infrastructure monitoring. Applications span pipelines, telecoms and power cables, railways, highways, mining, subsea cables, geophysical monitoring and border surveillance.

## Products and solutions

- **ONYX nano** - short-range DAS interrogator (1 to under 20 km) for small sites.
- **ONYX peta** - standard-range DAS interrogator (around 20 to 75 km per fibre) for medium sites.
- **ONYX peta EX** - long-range DAS interrogator (around 75 to 200 km per fibre) for large sites.
- **Operating System Software (OSS)** - core firmware with REST API, Modbus and SNMP integration.
- **Industry Application Software (IAS)** - bespoke application-specific user interfaces, with AI detection and classification.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ONYX conforms with FCC, CE and RoHS; tested against the Center for Internet Security (CIS) Benchmarks; reliability calculated per Telcordia SR-332.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

- **2026-03-26** - Shortlisted for a 2026 British Business Award in the Growth Strategy of the Year category. [source](https://sintela.com/sintela-shortlisted-for-a-2026-british-business-award/)

## Links

# Teledyne Defence & Space

> UK manufacturer of RF and microwave components, sub-systems and systems for defence, space, electronic warfare, radar and communications.

## What they do

Teledyne Defence & Space (TDS) designs, develops and manufactures complex integrated RF and microwave solutions from its site in Shipley, West Yorkshire. It is a business unit of Teledyne Microwave Solutions and part of the US-listed Teledyne group. TDS supports defence, space, security, electronic warfare, radar and communications customers, and describes itself as a supplier of ITAR-free and ITAR-compliant microwave products with over 40 years of heritage, tracing its origins to Filtronic Components Ltd.

- **Radar Warning Receivers (RWR)** - threat-warning receiver systems.

# tlmNexus Ltd

> Defence and security software house specialising in through-life equipment management, airworthiness and asset management.

## What they do

tlmNexus designs and operates digital representations of complex, high-value defence and security equipment, enabling maintenance and operational management decisions based on accurate, real-time data. The company solves through-life acquisition and support management issues for the defence sector, combining expertise-led consultancy with software development. It has supported the UK MOD Typhoon platform since 2007 and its airworthiness software is used across the majority of the UK's military registered aircraft, including fixed-wing, rotary-wing and uncrewed air systems.

# Zenotech Ltd

> Computational fluid dynamics and cloud HPC software developer serving aerospace, defence and other engineering markets.

## What they do

Zenotech develops cloud high-performance computing (HPC) and computational fluid dynamics (CFD) software, helping organisations run faster, more accurate and more cost-effective simulation. It serves aerospace, automotive, built environment, defence, renewables and transport, with HPC resources at the Bristol and Bath Science Park. Its CFD tools are tailored to transonic aircraft, both civil and defence, and to low-speed platforms, and it provides aerodynamic design analysis and drone flight-control validation services.

- **zCFD** - GPU-accelerated high-performance CFD solver, designed to be scalable and cost-effective.
- **HiPer CFD** - scale-resolving CFD simulation product for modern GPU hardware.
